Order 2 units. SPI interface. Mount magnet on motor shaft back face.

Base plate for motor mounts. 5052 alloy preferred.
Powers ODrive and motors. Jetson powered separately via USB-C PD.
Powers Jetson from 24V rail if USB-C PD supply unavailable.
Powers camera and fan from 24V rail.
For Jetson root filesystem and bag file logging. Any M.2 2280 NVMe.

Signal connectors for IMU and encoder power lines.

For attaching plates to aluminum extrusion.
